_comment: W3 account dimension — CI orchestration config (read by the infra-staging / infra-prod callers via jq). NOT a *.auto.tfvars.json, so terraform never auto-loads it. HEAD-vs-tag: this file (topology + pins) is read from HEAD; tf code + regions.auto.tfvars.json (scalars) come from the pinned ref. See docs/runbooks/2026-06-12-joint-strike.md §W3.
